# Provider Approval Request Template

> This is a template for customers/SOC to adapt to the provider's official process.

## Request

Customer requests approval to perform a controlled DDoS readiness validation for the following resources.

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Customer | `<Customer>` |
| Provider account/subscription/project | `<ID>` |
| Targets | `<Targets>` |
| Test window | `<Date/time/timezone>` |
| Test coordinator | AstraNull SOC |
| Emergency contact | `<Contact>` |
| Scenario class | `<L3/L4/L7/DNS/etc.>` |
| Expected max scope | `<Approved bounds>` |

## Safety controls

- SOC-gated execution.
- Declared target scope only.
- Live monitoring.
- Immediate stop capability.
- Customer emergency contacts available.
- Post-test report generated.

## Provider response

Approval reference: `<case/ticket/email>`

Approved targets: `<list>`

Approved window: `<window>`

Provider contact/escalation: `<contact>`
